item.title: John Mulaney is out of F’s and I’m here for it
item.dc:creator: ninjzaness

item.title: Extra Life - LFG!
item.description: I’m so honored to once again join team @Imgur and help with Extra Life - A charity event to help Children's Hospitals! My goal this year is to raise $2,250 toward their overall goal and I would love if you donated using my link below to help kids this year! I raise money for “Seattle Children’s”! I already pitched in!: https://www.extra-life.org/participant/521502 Also, special shoutout to @Imgur - who is not only my husband (long story - look up my Upvote Everything Day Posts) but who is always so supportive of me and who I am, and who has never turned me away! Also yes, I would be the one who knows how to pronounce it :P
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: "gotta wake up labor day to this?" vibes
item.description: story time: so i am 37, and have a little sister, that is 15, that lives with me, our mom lives with me also, i have a big enough home and it doesnt make sense to make my single mother pay california rents. anyway, i was home today, and i get a phone call from my sister "hey, i had a thing at school, the cops are here, they need your permission to talk to me because im a minor" instant WTF from me. like wut? sure talk to the cops. i hang up. then im like "wait, why are cops talking to her?" JUMP out of bed, get dressed, go to her school (down the road) to find out what happened. turns out that theres a boy (of course there is) thats been asking her out every few months for a few years now (kids being dumb, he's 15 whatever) and shes been saying no, but we can be friends. Today, the boys ex-gf (oh god i hate highschools) calls my little sister, and asks her "hey has he been asking you out, because he's been asking me to get back together with him for years now" now, my sister is not a liar. like she just doesnt lie. she will tell the truth even when its really not ideal. so she tells the girl "yes, he's been asking me out this whole time" ok, no problem so far right? yea, i know im annoyed at the whole story already. so the guys ex calls him and rips him a new one. and he in turns texts my sister to meet up by his class (woodshop, away from people) and starts yelling at her that why did she tell on him. she doesnt reply, then he starts threatening her, telling her that he's gonna come to her house with him adult cousins and beat her up and hospitalize her and all this completely unhinged things. it scared her so badly she called 911, then after the cops arrived she thought to call me. im on the phone with her, but cops want to talk to her now, and its on school grounds so the school is freaking out, and the only thing i manage to tell her is "make sure you make it clear you are pressing charges for harrassment and you want a police report and want to give a statement". i go to the school, she writes the statement, explains everything to the cops. the kid got arrested, and suspended and im thoroughly annoyed i even had to do this, originally my sister called me to tell me that they said they will find our house my reaction was like "im an unhinged vet with ptsd and a garden axe, please come over" but after the original anger i realized this is the perfect time to teach her how to file police reports and how to talk to the cops, she will probably bump into this situation again in the future. anyway, im just venting. i hope the kid learns a lesson. or comes over for revenge, i could care less which he chooses. but my 15 year old sister now knows how to file police reports.
item.dc:creator: Vamp13

item.title: You can find satisfaction on the bottom shelf.
item.description:
If I do not give proper sauce to each video, please know that it's because credit was not provided in the source stole it from. If you do have the sauce for any of these, leave it down in the comments and I'll update the notes.
Revered upon request https://imgur.com/gallery/F5rXL7i/comment/2419145955
https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=WNcsUNKlAKw
Stolen from @TheGrantAlexander
Stolen from @zoraniko
Stolen from @kakaopor
Credit from 8 YEARS AGO https://dribbble.com/shots/2367423-Organic-Transition
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
Stolen from my buddy @Fishy820 (my former Secret Santa match) happy super belated cake day!
@Patrac going super dad mode here
Here's some satisfying @Hochycookies
This is handmade by our very own @Ps991
Here's @Volturnus 's super dope tattoo stencil
This little cutie was drawn by @BreathingArts
This jaw dropping super @realisticcarpainting
Belle Âme
You can do it with Spiderman too ...but also┌∩┐(ಠ_ಠ)┌∩┐you guys.
(Don't worry. I put the actual satisfying video in the comments)
Follow twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka to watch us knock out all of these milestones live on stream. We'll be kicking off our donation celebration on Tuesday October 1st and keeping the party going until the grand finale on November 2nd! https://extra-life.org/participant/bottomshelfvodka
Stolen Goodest Boi tax from @dolphinyaso ❤️ I am begging all artists who are interested in donating a unique piece to our Extra-Life auction, as well as any people who would be interested in bidding on those pieces, to please join discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka Keep in mind that Imgur's Secret Santa is right around the corner! You can knock out three birds with one stone by supporting our Imgur community artists, Children's Hospital, AND finding the perfect gift for your future match. Imgur, by far, has the absolute most wholesome community when compared to any other shit-posting platforms. This time last year, you all donated $12,458 to the kids. Because of you, children can get the medical attention that they NEED, not just the medical attention their parents can afford.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: This month marks the anniversary of a hero's sacrifice.
item.description: On this month, a man by the name Francisco Erasmo Rodrigues de Lima, died wrestling an armed man and saved a woman the gunman held hostage. This occurred almost nine years ago but I feel that his bravery should never be forgotten. Rest in peace Francisco.

item.title: Wouldn't happen to a polar bear
item.dc:creator: Subsound

item.title: Fucking emotions
item.description: So yeah. Probation officer, I work with people on probation/parole. I'm a big dude, fit, capable, reliable. I'll spring I to action in the real world when people need help. And I'm broken. Cptsd diagnosis...working in corrections was fun (/s) yes I have a therapist, he's fucking awesome. I have friends but what I want above all else in the worst way is to just be held. I want to feel arms around me, I want someone to comfort me for a change. I'm just fucking exhausted. Check in on your friends. Especially the loud ones. Folks try the hardest when they're really hurting.
item.dc:creator: Syndicofberyl

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1144 (plutonium jazz)

It's morning. Pippin and I are ready to make the universe apologize for our continued existence. Let's get this bread.
Reference to the Old Testament book of Jonah.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "uh oh."
